name: HAINYA WORLD
short_description: You are an adventurer, you need to explore this continent, make good use of the resources of this continent to arm yourself, explore this world full of monsters and unknown things and survive!
detailed_description:
Join in Discord


About the Game

Hainya World EA 2.0 Major Update!

After a whole year of development, it's finally here!

We've revamped many game mechanics, significantly enhanced the visuals, and added even more fun gameplay elements!

Welcome to the Hainya World!

An RPG of Adventure x Creation!

Dig, build, battle, and explore!

Fight monsters, level up, break terrain, and gather materials to build your own base!

The kingdom is under attack by monsters!

To save it, adventurers set off to explore an ancient continent in search of untold mysteries!

Venture into the Unknown

Ancient Land

A forgotten ancient continent, where adventurers journey to investigate abnormal monster activity. Here, they can freely alter the terrain and construct structures to explore this unknown region.

Narus Continent

The homeland of adventurers and the main continent where the hainyaworld people live. It is home to many prosperous towns and residents. You can visit this land and interact with its people!

More Equipment & Skills

A more diverse equipment system, with the ability to change weapon skills!

Over 15 combat-style weapon types:

  • ﹝Sword & Shield, Greatsword, Axe﹞

  • ﹝Spear, Dual Blades, Daggers, Katana, Gauntlets﹞

  • ﹝Shortbow, Short Staff, Longbow, Long Staff, Holy Book, Dual Crossbows﹞

  • ﹝Handgun, Shotgun, Sniper Rifle, Assault Rifle﹞

  • Over 100 unique weapons

  • Over 100 types of equipment

  • 200 unique skills and techniques

An improved, easy-to-learn combat system—switch between different weapon styles at any time!

Battle Powerful Enemies and Claim Your Loot!

Haya World is filled with formidable foes!

Level up and upgrade your gear to take them on.

They carry rich rewards just waiting to be claimed!

Rich and glamorous, ever-changing fashion

A new fashion system to make your character shine even more!

Go on an adventure with NPC companions

You're never alone—team up with over 30 unique companions on your journey!
Collect over 10 types of companions!

More Fun-Filled Systems

Vehicles-Ride in style—explore the vast world with 20 different vehicle styles!

Fishing-Become a master angler—catch over 50 types of fish!

Farming-Live off the land—grow crops and farm in your own base!

Controller Support

You can enjoy Haya World with an Xbox controller—no additional setup required!

The game is also fully playable on Steam Deck.

Online Co-op

Team up with friends through Steam's online features~

Adventure together, create together!

Build your own unique Haya World together!
